invariants.name: state_transition
invariants.description: The algorithm maintains two DP states per node representing the maximum chain length within its subtree under distinct extendability conditions. These states are updated via fixed recurrence relations that aggregate child results and apply local degree-based offsets, ensuring the semantic definition of each state remains invariant throughout the traversal.

invariants.name: dependency_order
invariants.description: The computation strictly follows a post-order evaluation sequence, ensuring all child subtree states are fully resolved before any parent state is computed. This enforces a stable bottom-up data flow where state transitions rely exclusively on finalized subproblem results.
